prose: **Fukui Reactivity Analysis of Pyridine** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit), PySCF. Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz (fixed, single-point). Gas phase (implicit), charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral; cation and anion doublets for f⁺ and f⁻). SCF converged for all three electronic states. Mulliken partial charges and Fukui indices computed. **Most electrophilic site:** N (atom 1), f⁺ = 0.4842. **Most nucleophilic site:** C4 (atom 4), f⁻ = 0.1183. Dual descriptor N = 0.4201 (electrophilic); hydrogens H = −0.2236 to −0.2348 (nucleophilic). Charge conservation validated: Σ(f⁺) = 1.0000, Σ(f⁻) = 1.0000. Visualization saved to /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/argo_claude-haiku-4.5/20260703-201340_pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy.
